title: First Day at Amazing School
description: Bia walks into Amazing School for the first time. Learn greetings through the eyes of a 16-year-old surfer meeting her new classmates.
summary_pt_br: A primeira aula da Bia na Amazing School. Aprenda cumprimentos conhecendo a Bia, o Rafa, o Mr. Kumar e o Cosmo.

scenes.text_en: The sun rises over Praia do Sol. A yellow Labrador is napping by the front door of Amazing School. His name is Cosmo, and he greets every student with a wag of his tail.
scenes.text_pt: O sol nasce sobre Praia do Sol. Um labrador amarelo cochila na porta da Amazing School. Ele se chama Cosmo, e cumprimenta todo aluno com um abano de rabo.

scenes.text_en: Bia walks up the steps carrying her surfboard. She is sixteen and nervous ﻗ this is her first English class.
scenes.text_pt: A Bia sobe os degraus carregando a prancha de surf. Ela tem dezesseis anos e estﺣ۰ nervosa ﻗ ﺣ۸ a primeira aula de inglﺣ۹s dela.

turns.en: Good morning! Welcome to Amazing School.
turns.pt: Bom dia! Bem-vinda ﺣ  Amazing School.
Bom dia. Eu sou a Bia.

turns.en: Nice to meet you, Bia. I am Mr. Kumar.
turns.pt: Prazer em conhecer vocﺣ۹, Bia. Sou o Mr. Kumar.

exercise.question: Mr. Kumar says 'Good morning'. What's Bia's reply?
exercise.explanation: The polite move is to echo the greeting back. 'Good morning' until about noon, 'Good afternoon' noonﻗ5 p.m., 'Good evening' after 5 p.m.
exercise.hint_pt_br: O educado ﺣ۸ devolver o mesmo cumprimento. Morning vai atﺣ۸ meio-dia, afternoon atﺣ۸ o fim da tarde, evening ﺣ  noite.

scenes.text_en: Rafa, a 30-year-old food-truck owner, comes in smelling of coffee and coriander. He's the loudest student in the room.
scenes.text_pt: Rafa, dono de food truck de 30 anos, entra cheirando a cafﺣ۸ e coentro. ﺣ o aluno mais barulhento da sala.

turns.pt: Oi! E aﺣ­? Sou o Rafa.
Oi, Rafa. Eu sou a Bia.

scenes.title: Formal vs. informal greetings
scenes.body_en: English has two registers. Formal: 'Good morning. How are you?' Informal: 'Hey! What's up?' Use formal with teachers, strangers, and elders. Use informal with friends your age.
scenes.body_pt: O inglﺣ۹s tem dois registros. Formal: 'Good morning. How are you?' Informal: 'Hey! What's up?' Use o formal com professores, estranhos e pessoas mais velhas. Informal com amigos da sua idade.

exercise.explanation: Four expressions that cover ~80% of everyday greetings.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Essas quatro cobrem a maioria das situaﺣ۶ﺣﭖes do dia a dia.

exercise.question: Rafa introduces himself: 'Hi! ___ name is Rafa.'
exercise.explanation: Possessive 'my' before 'name'. 'My name is Rafa' is how you say your own name.

scenes.text_en: Cosmo wanders in and sits by Bia's feet. He wags his tail. Rafa laughs. Even the dog welcomes her.
scenes.text_pt: Cosmo entra e senta aos pﺣ۸s da Bia. Ele abana o rabo. Rafa ri. Atﺣ۸ o cachorro a recebe bem.

exercise.question: It's 7:42 a.m. You enter a room. Which greeting fits best?
exercise.explanation: Before noon ﻗ 'Good morning'. 'Good night' is NOT a greeting ﻗ it's a goodbye used at bedtime.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Cuidado: 'Good night' nﺣ۲o ﺣ۸ cumprimento de entrada ﻗ ﺣ۸ despedida para dormir (boa noite no sentido de 'atﺣ۸ amanhﺣ۲').

scenes.text_en: Mr. Kumar smiles. 'That's our first scene,' he says. 'Tomorrow we'll practice asking names ﻗ and Cosmo will be there too.'
scenes.text_pt: Mr. Kumar sorri. 'Foi nossa primeira cena,' ele diz. 'Amanhﺣ۲ vamos praticar como perguntar o nome ﻗ e o Cosmo vai estar lﺣ۰ tambﺣ۸m.'

scenes.title: First day ﻗ meeting Mr. Kumar
scenes.pt_summary: Seu primeiro dia na Amazing School. Mr. Kumar te recebe.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Good morning! Welcome to Amazing School.
turns.pt: Bom dia! Bem-vindo ﺣ  Amazing School.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Good morning. My name is Leo.
turns.pt_hint: Bom dia. Meu nome ﺣ۸ Leo.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Nice to meet you, Leo. How are you today?
turns.pt: Prazer em te conhecer, Leo. Como vai hoje?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am fine, thank you. And you?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I am very well. Where are you from?
turns.pt: Estou muito bem. De onde vocﺣ۹ ﺣ۸?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Wonderful. Your first class is at nine.
turns.pt: Maravilha. Sua primeira aula ﺣ۸ ﺣ s nove.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: One more thing ﻗ have a great day!
turns.pt: Mais uma coisa ﻗ tenha um ﺣﺏtimo dia!

scenes.title: Listening story ﻗ First Day at Amazing School
scenes.pt_summary: Ouﺣ۶a a situaﺣ۶ﺣ۲o com atenﺣ۶ﺣ۲o. Depois, escreva em inglﺣ۹s o que vocﺣ۹ entendeu ﻗ resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglﺣ۹s o que vocﺣ۹ ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que vocﺣ۹ achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Mr. Kumar and a student. Bia walks into Amazing School for the first time. Learn greetings through the eyes of a 16-year-old surfer meeting her new classmates. Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: Mr. Kumar
paragraphs.en: Good morning! Welcome to Amazing School.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Good morning. My name is Leo.

paragraphs.speaker: Mr. Kumar
paragraphs.en: Nice to meet you, Leo. How are you today?

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: I am fine, thank you. And you?

paragraphs.speaker: Mr. Kumar
paragraphs.en: I am very well. Where are you from?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Mr. Kumar. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "First Day at Amazing School". Bia walks into Amazing School for the first time. Learn greetings through the eyes of a 16-year-old surfer meeting her new classmates. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key ﻗ listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice ﻗ listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave ﺣ۸ a prﺣ۰tica: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus prﺣﺏprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "First Day at Amazing School". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'First Day at Amazing School'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o tﺣ­tulo: "First Day at Amazing School".

scenes.title: Go deeper ﻗ free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiﺣ۰veis para vocﺣ۹ estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
